bolt.directive: Monitor the performance impact of new UX configurations. Ensure that new autostart items or theme settings do not significantly degrade Plasma startup times.

palette.directive: Validate the implementation of Windows-familiar shortcuts and default themes. Ensure contrast is adequate and navigation is intuitive for users transitioning from other OSes.

sentinel.directive: Audit newly introduced desktop entries and configuration files for potential privilege escalation vectors or unintended execution paths.

note: Standard development has resumed focusing on Phase 6 UX Polish. Ensure all refinements align with the core stability principles.
